ftbquests.chapter.0D5E7267C8F6781C.quest: &lThis alloy plant will unlock &d&lend-game technologies for you!&r
Photon mechanisms are the most powerful and fastest in the mod.
They do not require cooling and are perfect &7for full automation of production at &lmaximum speed!&r
Generate &l&9neutron&r.
To get a &7neutron shard&r - collect neutron in a capsule and place it in the compressor.
&lNeutron ingot&r can add an upgrade slot for a tool in the &7modification station.&r
Required for the operation of the &lquantum quarry&r.
Extracts various essences.
The quarry runs on &l&bquantum energy.
To operate, place a &7module analyzer&r and &7spatial plasma of the quantum world&r into it.
If you want to mine only certain ores, place a &7black or white list module&r.
There are also other modules, but the quarry only supports &lone&r of them.
Significantly speeds up ore extraction &7in exchange for higher energy consumption.&r
Significantly speeds up ore extraction &7in exchange for higher energy consumption.&r
Significantly speeds up ore extraction &7in exchange for higher energy consumption.&r
Each subsequent level of the &7Luck module&r increases the number of crystals extracted.
Each subsequent level of the &7Efficiency module&r reduces costs by 5%%.
With this module, ores are immediately smelted upon extraction.
Upgrade the quarry to reduce &bQE&r consumption.
Upgrade the quarry to reduce &bQE&r consumption.
Upgrade the quarry to reduce &bQE&r consumption.
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Generates its own type of matter for &b50,000,000 EF.&r
Replicator in all its glory!
Produce resources from &dsolid matter!&r
In the converter, 1 matter = &7200 units of matter.&r
&bFor crafting in the Wilson chamber, quantum energy is required.&r
Generates &dpositron energy&r for the cyclotron.
It must be placed close to the &7positron container of the cyclotron.&r
&bWorks on quantum energy.&r
Produces &dneutrinos&r for crafting&7 in the Wilson chamber.&r
Neutrinos are also needed to craft the cyclotron itself.
Use &ladvanced accelerators&r for maximum speed!
The cyclotron is needed for synthesizing radioactive elements and more.
First, supply &dpositron energy&r &7(previous quest).&r
Supply &bquantum energy&r to the &7quantum energy storage.&r
Then supply &9cryogen&r to the &7cryogen storage.&r
Now the multi-block is ready to work - place the item needed for synthesis in the &7bombardment chamber&r.
Start the process in the &7controller interface.&r
Collect the product in the &7electrostatic deflector&r.
ftbquests.chapter.0D5E7267C8F6781C.title: &#FF1EEC&lP&#E81FEF&le&#D11FF2&lr&#BA20F6&lf&#A320F9&le&#8C21FC&lc&#7521FF&lt &#1EFFE7&le&#1EEFE9&ll&#1FE0EB&le&#1FD0EE&lc&#1FC1F0&lt&#1FB1F2&lr&#20A2F4&li&#2092F6&lc &#2073FB&le&#2164FD&lr&#2154FF&la
ftbquests.chapter.100A225B6AEDABCD.quest: If you need to quickly build a multi-block &o(for example, a smeltery)&r, then &7right-click on the structure controller and if you have the necessary blocks in your inventory, it will build the structure.&r
The deplaner will disassemble the multi-block.
Expand standard chests!
Iron upgrades
Find obelisks around the world!
The pack includes a mod for simpler and more flexible pipes than in IU.
&7Use pipe upgrades to access modes and filters.&r
In mountainous biomes, volcanoes can sometimes be found.
&cBut don't rush to approach them, you will be poisoned by toxic gas!&r
Create a &6heat-resistant suit&r.
In volcanoes, you can find ores and minerals, as well as &6sulfur&r and &6boron&r.
At the bottom of the volcano, above the lava, you can find a &6basalt chest&r with loot, but it is quite difficult to find.
&lVolcanoes
&lBasalt lava&r can be found at the very mouth of the volcano or from below.
Use &6basalt lava&r in the smeltery instead of regular lava!
At the electric stage, where you can process ore 1k2, you will need &6hydrofluoric acid&r.
The easiest way to get it is from these blocks. &7(See JEI)&r
&lDigs &d3x3&r block!
You can &6repair it&r with &liron&r in an anvil.
Mine some iron and make your first hammer!
&7Perfect for mining veins.&r
Dig! Dig!
Advanced version of the hammer, durability is &d3 times higher&r.
Mining speed remains the same.
Dig with steel!
From &cRubin&r, &eTopaz&r and &bSapphire&r you can craft tools, as well as &6armor&r!
Use capsules instead of buckets.
Right-click and insert the required block into the slot.
&7Then right-click on a pipe or wire - and it will take the form of this block.&r
A useful tool for construction!

Many mechanisms in the game emit &6air and soil pollution&r when working. Pollution can spread up to 10 chunks from the pollution source. Pollution cleans itself naturally - it decreases by half &3every 5 minutes&r. Soil and air are polluted separately.
There is also a possibility to speed up their cleaning with the help of a &cperformance module&r.
&aIn easy mode, these mechanisms have been moved to an earlier stage.&r
The first thing that will pollute the air and soil is the &6smeltery&r.
&6Steam mechanisms&r also pollute the environment.
But don't worry - at early stages this shouldn't cause serious problems :)
The description of the mechanism indicates how much it pollutes the environment.
Pay attention to this.
The mod has the ability to clean the environment from pollution.
For air - it's the &6air-separating unit&r, it sucks in air and separates it into elements, simultaneously cleaning the air. Works from energy.
For soil - it's the &6soil cleaner&r. Works from energy.
&lPollution from mechanisms
Use trash cans to get rid of excess &9liquid&r, &6items&r, or even &benergy&r.
Use it to calculate how many resources you will need &7to create the desired item or mechanism.&r
Attracts items directly into the inventory.
The ore scanner will make it easier to find the desired vein.
&7Shows veins within a radius of 4 chunks&r.
Right-click on the pipe or wire and select the side that will not connect to another pipe or wire.
&7Works for all types of pipes and wires from IU.&r
When picking up radioactive elements, the box immediately places them in its inventory, preventing damage.
&cThe only option&r to obtain diamonds before the electrical era.
Break the pebbles on the surface - they drop random ore contained in the vein.
&7Break crystal vein pebbles to get &bdiamond ore&r.
This is a simple way to get resources without digging deep right away!
Shows the level of air and soil pollution in the chunk.
Take a backpack with you!
ftbquests.chapter.100A225B6AEDABCD.title: &lInformation and tips
ftbquests.chapter.18F4452C86824019.quest: Hydrogen
This mechanism produces liquid matter from energy, which is needed for the replicator.
&d1mB of liquid matter&r = &b1,000,000 EF&r
Supply energy and &dliquid matter&r to the replicator.
In the interface, select the desired template and click &7"repeat launch".&r
This block stores recorded items in a template for the replicator.
It must be placed close to the replicator.
In the memory crystal, you can record an item for another template storage.
Place it next to the template storage and scan what you need.
To find out if an item can be created in the replicator, &7hover and hold shift over it.&r
It should show how much liquid matter it requires.
&lOne way to produce resources from energy in the replicator!&r
Resource generation
Can be useful for quick crushing of ores.
The excavator accepts &7"crushing module"&r.
&7"Smelting module"&r will not work on ores.
One of the ways to get &bQE (Quantum energy)&r.
Converts EF to QE.
If the conversion speed is not enough - add upgrades &7energy storage&r and &7energy level&r.
Nitrogen
More advanced way to generate QE.
Transfers &bquantum energy&r.
Stores &bquantum energy.&r
Create modules to increase rotor efficiency!
Create modules to increase rotor efficiency!
&7&lGreat way to generate energy&r

&lCores&r — optional, they affect the overall level of the panel and increase its stability. &7This means that if a core is present, a greater difference between the levels of components is allowed, and the panel will still remain stable.&r
Assemble the panel from glasses, battery packs, sockets, and cores.
For each panel component, there is a mechanism in which it is crafted.
Insert into the slots under the glass - daytime, nighttime, or daily glasses &7(they can be combined at your discretion).&r
Pay attention to the &llevel of glasses&r: the greater the levels &ndiffer&r, the lower the stability of placement and, consequently, the efficiency of the panel.
If all glasses are of the same level, you will receive a &lbonus.&r &7(This also applies to batteries with sockets)&r
If you have installed daytime glasses - at night, generation will not occur, and vice versa.
Next, insert &lockets&r into the &7mini-panel&r - they determine the output of energy from the panel. It is important that their level is higher than the level of generation.
&lBatteries&r are responsible for the energy capacity of the panel.
Regular solar panels are ineffective at this stage without good modules.
Better to craft an improved panel and collect &7mini-panel collector&r.
&7Note: glass for panels in new versions of the mod is crafted in a new way.&r
Clean your panels with this tool when they get dirty, &7to maintain their efficiency.&r
Automatic version in the form of a module. &7Insert it into the panel.&r
&l&7Information about the steam turbine:&r
The temperature is reduced by radiators and cooling liquid. &7There are different liquids with different efficiencies:&r
&bHydrogen &l×1
&bNitrogen &l×1.5
&bRefrigerant &l×2.5
&bHelium &l×4
&bCryogen &l×8
Some liquids and gases are only available in more advanced versions of the turbine.
After acceleration, the turbine will start to generate energy steadily. &7Watch the temperature and the wear time of the blades.&r
The steam turbine is a large multi-level structure capable of producing a lot of energy.
Some turbine blocks &ncan be of improved type&r, but the level of the steam controller must not be lower than the other components - otherwise, the turbine will not start.
&lFor operation, it requires:&r
Steam, cooling liquid, 4 radiators, and steam blades &7(max 36 pcs).&r
Place the &lblades&r in the &7blade controller&r. The blades wear out and cannot be repaired - make a stock.
After supplying steam and cooling, acceleration will begin. The higher the pressure, the faster the acceleration, but the more steam is consumed and the hotter it gets. &lIf the turbine overheats:&r
&7Reduce the maximum phase level in the controller.
&7Or reduce the pressure - the acceleration will be slower, but more stable.
Sodium hydroxide
You can upgrade the coke oven as needed.
Advanced way to craft &7night glasses&r faster.
Requires &0&lnight energy.&r
Produces &lnight energy&r from solar energy.
&7Requires quantum energy to operate.&r
The night pipe transmits energy.
Information can also be found in the &7reactor GUI.&r
At the moment, only &6first-level components&r are available to you.
See the description of each component - it indicates which level of reactor it is intended for:
1 - regular reactor.
1-2 - improved reactor.
1-3 - advanced reactor.
1-4 - perfect reactor.
There are more advanced versions of the reactor with expanded schemes.
&aNote: if the radiation level in the reactor fills up, it will explode - always vent it through the dome&r
&l&7How to start:&r
After building the structure, supply &7water&r and &bhelium&r to the &7tanks&r.
Extract hydrogen and oxygen from other tanks, and take energy from the socket.
In &2 intercoolers&r, place &7fans&r, and in &2 recirculation pumps&r - &7pumps&r.
To lay out the scheme, you need to &caccelerate the reactor&r to the first level!
To accelerate, press the green button in the controller's GUI, then supply energy to the reactor socket and fill the scale to &b4,000,000 EF&r - the level will rise to the first.
In the &7reactor controller&r, you can insert special &lmodules&r that will increase the efficiency of the reactor.
There are many such modules, &7see their descriptions.&r
Generates helium, which requires &7gas-cooled reactor.&r
Chlorine
You can get sodium dust in three ways.
The first metal from space!
Information can also be found in the &7reactor GUI.&r
To lay out the simplest scheme &7(if you need the reactor only for radiation - the simplest scheme is enough)&r, you need to &caccelerate the reactor&r to the first level!
To accelerate, press the green button in the controller's GUI, then supply energy to the reactor socket and fill the scale to &b4,000,000 EF&r - the level will rise to the first.
At the moment, only &6first-level components&r are available to you.
See the description of each component - it indicates which level of reactor it is intended for:
1 - regular reactor.
1-2 - improved reactor.
1-3 - advanced reactor.
1-4 - perfect reactor.
Simple stable scheme:
1 uranium rod, 4 regular plates.
&9Liquid reactor&r will be your first reactor - it is not mandatory in development, but can eliminate the problem with &aradiation&r for the enrichener. It also generates energy!
To find more schemes, you can go to the &7Industrial Upgrade mod discord server.&r
&aNote: if the radiation level in the reactor fills up, it will explode - always vent it through the dome&r
There are more advanced versions of the reactor with expanded schemes.
&7How to remove radiation from the reactor - see the next quest.&r
&l&7How to start:&r
After building the structure, supply &7liquid input&r with &9water&r.
For simple schemes, this will be enough, but more advanced schemes that require significantly more cooling will need &brefrigerant&r.
Extract steam from the liquid output, and take energy from the socket.
{image:kubejs:textures/quests/reactor_water_scheme.png width:100 height:100 align:1}
Studying at the table is only tied to the player who placed it.
&7To transfer knowledge, create a tome, record the knowledge in it, and give it to another player.&r
Multi-block for extracting more gases.
Build the structure, supply energy, and &7enable analysis in the analyzer.&r
The chance to detect a gas vein is &15%%&r
The vein may contain: &7bromine, iodine, fluorine, and fluorine&r in an amount of 200 B.
If nothing is found, it will give an error.
Gas well
Create various modules for the rotor.
Space research begins with the first lens, which is placed in the &7table of space research.&r
To study distant planets and their satellites, you will need &nmore advanced lenses&r.
Requires energy.
Place it near the reactor - it will draw radiation "through the air" directly from the reactor.
&c&lBe careful:&r if you break it or twist it with a wrench, radiation will spread throughout the chunk!
This multi-block generates energy from various gases.
&7Press "U" in the inventory on the turbine controller to see the available gases.&r
Place &74 recuperator blocks&r with one regular &6radiator&r (2 blocks located on top and 2 blocks on the bottom).
Metal that opens the advanced era of mechanisms!
If your chunk is &ainfected with radiation&r — it can be cleaned.
Place a &6soil analyzer&r, supply energy, and wait for the analysis to complete.
Then place a &6radiation cleaner&r next to it and supply energy.
If the radiation level exceeds 500 nSv, the cleaner will clean the chunk, and you will receive &7radioactive waste&r.
&lOpens the stage of perfect technologies!&r
&lOpens new advanced alloys!&r
This table is the most important for space research!
&3Probes&r (from 20%% research),
&3Satellites&r (from 50%%),
&3Rockets&r (from 80%%).
Each device requires &efuel&r (hydrazine, dimethylhydrazine, decane, or xenon) and &eenergy&r — without them, it may be lost.
Load resources into the devices through the rocket platform, using tanks and energy storage.
After launch, you will be able to track the &7movement of the device&r and the time until the mission is completed.
Upon reaching 100%% research, the function of creating a &acolony&r will become available.
&cImportant: watch out for environmental conditions. High temperature or pressure can destroy the device.
&cAdditional information in the table interface.
&7Hover the cursor in the interface over the icon at the top right.&r
At your disposal will be a research interface, where you can study various space objects: planets, satellites, and asteroids.
It will all start with the &eSolar System&r, but over time, others will open up.
For space research, you will need a &6lens&r - without it, you won't see any planets.
Each object has its own level, and without the required research level, access to it will be closed.
To start expeditions, you need to craft a &6rocket platform&r and one of the four types of spacecraft:
&3Rovers&r (can be launched immediately),
&lButadiene-nitrile
Polybutadiene
Polyacrylonitrile
Butadiene
Ethanol
Ethylene
Acetylene
Methane
This branch is dedicated to &6synthetic rubber&r and further crafts from it.
Natural gas
Launch pad for all devices.
Pour fuel into it and supply energy.
Acrylonitrile
Polypropylene
Nitrogen monoxide
Hydrogen nitride
Nitrogen
Propylene
Dibromopropane
Get &7polypropylene&r directly from oil.
Bromine
Propane
The first fuel for spacecraft.
Hydrazine - the first fuel!
Universal wires can transmit &l simultaneously&r energy, heat, or cooling for mechanisms.
The chemical plant will be available to you after &9advanced alloy factory&r.
&lRequires quantum energy to operate!&r
Supply quantum energy to both sockets.
Supply liquid &diodine&r to both &7heat exchangers&r.
In both &7tanks for separated substances&r, supply &6helium&r.
And finally, start the process in the &7controller!&r
Collect the refrigerant in the &7waste block&r.
Assemble your first spacecraft on it!
Upgrade your spacecraft.
&l&7Space in Industrial Upgrade is just a simulation and cannot be physical.&r
As you progress, new &bextraterrestrial metals&r will be revealed to you, without which further development in the mod will become impossible.
Space
&lSpace
Hydrogen nitride
&lColonies are a step towards automatic resource extraction&r
1× Protection I
1× Solar panel I
&7(all items must be in the inventory when clicking "Create colony")&r
&eMore information is обязательно read in the colony interface in the table.&r
After fully studying a space object, you can establish a &acolony&r on it.
A colony is a simulation of construction and automatic receipt of &3resources&r and &9liquids&r without player participation.
Each colony has an &elevel&r, which increases as experience is accumulated.
Experience is generated by &6workers&r, placed in the corresponding buildings. The higher the level, the more buildings and opportunities become available.
❱ &7To start building a colony, you will need:&r
3× Residential module I
2× Factory I
1× Oxygen module I
Information
Colonies!
This multi-block can collect a large amount of &7lithium&r, &7boron&r, or &7beryllium&r at once.
Build the structure so that in the &lthree chunk radius&r there is a large amount of:
Sand - for &6lithium&r, &7the desert is perfect.&r
Gravel - for &6boron&r, &7the mountain biome with gravel is perfect.&r
Soil - for &6beryllium&r, &7any biome is suitable.&r
After building the structure, be sure to supply energy &7to the controller&r and fill the energy scale to 100,000 EF.
Turn on the career analyzer, and after the analysis is complete, turn on the career itself.
Ores are stored in the career chests.
Synthesize radioactive elements!
Sodium hypochlorite
This mechanism will be needed for crafts in the future.
Maximum acceleration!
&lRequires quantum energy to operate!&r
If you are using reactors and refrigerants, their by-product is &chot refrigerant&r.
To use it beneficially, you can make this multi-block.
The geothermal pump creates oil. (3mB of hot refrigerant = 1mB of oil)
Connect &b&lquantum energy&r to two sockets.
In the heat exchanger, supply &chot refrigerant&r and then turn it on in the controller.
Take oil &7from two sockets&r, as well as by-products from &7waste blocks&r.
At this stage, you can create an &lelectric refrigerator&r!
ftbquests.chapter.18F4452C86824019.title: &6&lExtended &#1EFFE7&le&#1EEFE9&ll&#1FE0EB&le&#1FD0EE&lc&#1FC1F0&lt&#1FB1F2&lr&#20A2F4&li&#2092F6&lc &#2073FB&le&#2164FD&lr&#2154FF&la
ftbquests.chapter.292851496F040C0B.quest: &#5DFFFA&lI&#55F1F9&lU&#4CE3F9&l: &#3BC8F7&lH&#33BAF7&lo&#2AACF6&lr&#229EF5&li&#1991F4&lz&#1183F4&lo&#0875F3&ln &roffers two recipe modes - &aeasy&r and &6default&r.
&l&6Default&r - standard recipes of the Industrial Upgrade mod.
&l&aEasy&r - less costly recipes of the Industrial Upgrade mod.
To switch from &6default&r to &aeasy&r, enter the following commands in the chat:
&o&3/kubejs packmode easy&r
And then &o&3/reload&r
Recipe modes
&aRecipe modes
&l&7About the ore system:&r
All ores in the game are generated as &nveins underground&r. Pebbles scattered on the surface serve as a hint - they indicate that there is a vein directly beneath them.
Usually, such veins are located at a depth of &210–15 blocks&r.
Each vein has an equal chance to generate, and the size of the vein can vary - from small to large.
&6&lIn mountainous biomes, the chance of finding a large vein is increased by 20%%!&r
&7While exploring the world, don't forget to mark each found vein. Press the &3"U"&7 key to open the list of all marks. Sooner or later, they will come in handy!&r
&l&7How to know what ores are in the vein:&r

To find out which vein a particular ore spawns in, use the &2REI&r mod. Just hover the cursor over the ore you're interested in in the inventory and press the &3R&r key — &7a window with vein information will open.&r
Ores
&aOres in veins
If you have any questions or bugs - you can write them on the mod's discord server.
&o&7Click on the discord icon at the top.
Before asking a question, make sure this information is not written in the quests.
&aDiscord
To see the craft of any item in the inventory, hover the cursor over it and press &6"R"&7.
To find out where the item is used - press &6"U"&7.
&7Also, if you press &6"U"&7 on a mechanism in the inventory, you will see which recipes it supports.&r
JEI
&aREI
ftbquests.chapter.292851496F040C0B.title: &#E6FF1E&lW&#EAEF1E&le&#EDDE1F&ll&#F1CE1F&lc&#F4BE20&lo&#F8AE20&lm&#FB9D21&le&#FF8D21&l!
ftbquests.chapter.47BD500A3691AC25.quest: Your first step in IU is to craft an &6anvil with a hammer&r.
&7The anvil wears out over time - repair it with titanium (Shift + RMB on the anvil).&r
&7All primitive mechanisms have a "skill" that increases with use.&r
&7The higher the skill, the higher the speed of the mechanism.&r
&6&lSensor template&r - one of the most commonly used components. Prepare them in advance!
This is the first and most important steam mechanism - it produces &6steam&r.
For the steam boiler to work, a &csource of lava&r must be placed underneath. After that, pour water into the boiler &7(RMB on it with a bucket or capsule).&r
&62 mB of water = 1 mB of steam&r.
&61 capsule = 1 bucket = 1000 mB&r.
&7Tip: Make two steam boilers right away - they will be useful later for creating a pressure converter.&r
&aIn easy mode, hardened glass for lamps can be smelted in the furnace.
&lAbout the new rubber extraction mechanics:&r
The rubber extraction process has become more complex and realistic. Each rubber tree generates with a limited number of sections containing &6latex&r.
The latex content in rubber trees depends on the biome: &7Regular&r < &aSwampy&r < &6Tropical&r.
&lLatex extraction:&r
Right-click on the latex &6with a tap&r to get &6raw latex&r.
If you are collecting latex in the world and do not plan to return to these trees, you can safely take latex until the texture becomes a regular tree - this means that there is no more latex there.
But if you planted rubber trees at your base, collect latex only &6once&r - then it will gradually restore, and the tree will continue to produce latex again.
&6Latex extractor&r processes raw latex into liquid latex.
Just place raw latex inside and &6hold RMB with a tap&r on it to start the process.
Connect a &bliquid pipe&r from the extractor to the dryer.
When there is enough &6liquid latex&r - the process will start automatically.
Smelt latex into rubber!
Later, make a &6steam extractor&r to get rubber at a ratio of &b1 to 3&r - much more profitable than regular smelting!
Flint is an important component for crafting sensors and electrical circuits.
In standard mode, you can enchant a shovel with &6Luck&r and dig gravel to obtain silicon, or crush gravel in a crusher.
To obtain &6silicon dust&r, use a crusher: from 2 silicons, you will get 1 dust.
&aIn easy mode, the crafting was added: from 3 gravel - 1 flint.
&aSilicon dust can be crafted from 4 silicons and a crushing element - &lelement is not consumed.
&l&7Your main goals in this era will be:&r
&6&lSmeltery&r - it is necessary for the production of many alloys.
&6&lPrimitive mechanisms&r - the first primitive processing of resources.
&6&lFirst steam mechanism&r - to lay the foundations for further automation.
Goal
&lGoal of the primitive era!
To &7get diamonds&r at the initial stage, you should make a &lhammer&r from ferromanganese.
&7&lRead more in the "information and tips" section.&r
&l&7Resources required:&r
To smelt metal or a gear, select it in the controller and the process will immediately start in the casting block.
&oDon't forget about the pipes that will help you take and place items in the smeltery.&r
&6Standard:&r 1 stack and 36 yttrium, spinel, and brick blocks.
&aEasy:&r 20 yttrium, spinel, and brick blocks.
And also other metals for the parts of the smeltery &7(see their recipes).&r
&lHow to use:&r
Supply lava to the tanks located at the back of the smeltery. &7(Basalt lava accelerates the metal smelting process - read more about it in the "Information and tips" section)&r

In the smeltery's furnace, place the metal that is needed for smelting or mixing. &7(It is more profitable not to smelt all ores into ingots in regular furnaces, but to leave raw ore for the smeltery)&r
In the controller, select the desired melted metals and click &6"mix"&r or &6"mix all"&r.
In the casting block, place &7ingot mold&r or &7gear mold&r.
Stock up on lava!
&l&7How to use:&r
Place the required item inside the mechanism and &7hold RMB with your hand on the block&r - the process will start.
Primitive mechanisms &7cannot be automated&r, so everything must be done manually.
Additional information is in the mechanism description.
&cIn the primitive crusher, you cannot crush ores.&r
&l&7How to use:&r
Place the required item inside the mechanism and &7hold RMB with your hand on the block&r - the process will start.
Primitive mechanisms &7cannot be automated&r, so everything must be done manually.
Additional information is in the mechanism description.
&l&7How to use:&r
Put what you need in the mechanism and press RMB on it &6with cutters&r.
&cCraft wires more profitably!&r
Additional information is in the mechanism description.
&aIn easy mode, you can craft wires in the workbench, but in this mechanism, the crafting will be a bit more profitable.&r
A mechanism for insulating wires.
&7Information in the mechanism description.&r
Information in the mechanism description.
This mechanism will be needed for the production of &6silicon discs&r, which are used in the crafting of electrical circuits.
Make &7crystal growers&r in advance and stock up on silicon!
Place &73 silicon dusts&r inside, and then &7flint&r - the process will start.
One operation takes &e12 minutes and 30 seconds&r.
ftbquests.chapter.47BD500A3691AC25.title: &a&lPrimitive era
ftbquests.chapter.56AEAC22236F88E3.quest: &l&7Your main tasks at this stage will be:&r
&6Transition from steam to electricity&r - replace steam mechanisms with their electric counterparts.
&6Ensuring stable energy production&r - set up EF generation on a permanent basis.
&6Production of lithium&r - an important step for future technologies.
&6Plastic&r - a key resource for advanced mechanisms, accelerators, and more.
&eUpgraded alloy factory&r - the first of the key electrical mechanisms that will open up access to many alloys previously produced only in the smeltery.
&aUranium processing&r - for further technologies.
Goals of the basic electrical era
&lGoals of the basic electrical era
This generator is the &lmost powerful&r of the listed ones, but it requires &bnatural gas&r to operate.
&l&7Pay attention to its energy level, this is the third one.&r
Efficiency: &61B of natural gas&r = &b225,000 EF&r
To find natural gas, you will need a &6gas sensor&r, for which a &6third-level circuit&r is required.
Use the sensor by right-clicking - it will display the deposits of natural gas, as well as other gases that may be useful later.
&3Gas can be collected with capsules.&r
Generates &lhelium&r, which is needed for a more advanced cooling mixture.
More advanced version of the accelerator.
Allows accelerating mechanisms that do not support regular upgrades, such as &6alkaline earth ore miner&r.
The maximum mechanism accommodates 10 modules.
Place a &7drilling rig&r and analyze the chunk, with some chance you will find a &bgas vein&r.
Press &7[F3+G]&r to see the chunk borders.
If you found a chunk with a gas vein - &7place a gas installation.&r
You will need this mechanism for &lproducing plastic&r and more.
It works on &eSE energy&r.
To get SE energy, make a &esolar energy generator&r, it is in the quest chain.
Transfers &eSE energy&r.
The second way to use the quarry is to excavate &lveins&r, discovered with the help of &l&7drilling rig&r.
&7The drilling rig can be upgraded with an upgrade kit.
Analyze the chunk with the drilling rig - with a 15%% chance you will find a &lmineral vein&r.
&7(The chance is the same for each type of mineral)&r
Place a &l&6quarry&r in this chunk, select in the interface the mode &7«ores and veins»&r -
and it will start to extract the discovered mineral.
&7Unlike the "ores" mode, it does not dig ordinary physical ores underground, but specifically &lmineral vein&r&7, which represents a "hidden resource of the chunk".&r
{image:kubejs:textures/quests/showcase_mineral.png width:100 height:100 align:center}
{image:kubejs:textures/quests/showcase_quarry.png width:160 height:100 align:center}
This device prevents explosions of mechanisms.
Connect it to the wire chain and press the button &7"Find energy networks".&r
&7After this, your mechanisms are safe and will not explode in case of anything.&r
If more energy goes to the mechanism than its energy level, the energy will simply not be supplied until you place a transformer.
Control your energy!
&61B of gasoline&r = &b50,000 EF&r
Replaces the network of wires with better analogs.
Connect it to the wire chain and press the button &7"Find energy networks".&r
Place wires in it and press the button &7"Update energy networks".&r
Upgrade that will increase the energy level of the mechanism.
&aIn easy mode, the crafting of the transformer has been significantly simplified.&r
In the future, for a large number of accelerators, there may not be enough energy. &7In this case, there is an upgrade "energy storage".&r
These upgrades by default push or suck the finished product from the mechanism in any direction.
&7Right-click while holding the upgrade to open the settings for sides and whitelist.&r
Similar to a regular pusher, but for liquids.
&aIn easy mode, at this stage, you can make it for air purification and nitrogen production.&r
Stores EF energy.
Capacity &b40,000 EF&r.
The front side is the energy output, &7all other sides accept energy.&r
Improved version of the energy storage.
Capacity 300,000 EF.
&7But note that it has a &lsecond energy level&r&7 - a transformer will be required to connect to the mechanisms!&r
Lowers &b128 EF&r to &b32 EF&r.
&7The front side (five dots) is the energy input, the other sides are outputs.
{image:kubejs:textures/quests/transformer_showcase.png width:130 height:100 align:center}
Stores &e100,000 SE.&r
&61B of diesel&r = &b100,000 EF&r
Divide oil into diesel and gasoline.
Oil is generated as small water bodies in the &edesert&r.
Right now we need it for &6diesel&r and &6gasoline.&r
&6Diesel&r generates twice as much energy as gasoline.
There are &66&r varieties of oil in the game.
The most efficient is the &6sweet heavy oil&r, from which the largest amount of diesel fuel is obtained.
Oil
Many electric mechanisms require &bcooling&r.
Your first refrigerator will be &6thermoelectric&r.
Cooling can be transmitted through &bcooling pipes&r.
For its operation, you can use: &7snowballs, snow, ice, packed ice, blue ice&r - in order of increasing efficiency.
&7Note: for it to work, you do not need to press the power button in the interface. The refrigerator works automatically: if cooling is not required, it does not consume fuel.
&7When you turn it on, it will constantly use fuel.
&lCooling

Don't be scared by the abundance of mechanisms - we won't describe each one separately, like the crusher, for example. &7Make them as needed.&r We will only cover important mechanisms, liquids, and items that move you forward.&r
The first of these mechanisms is the &6&lalloy factory&r. It will open access to new alloys and partially replace the smeltery.
&7&lTitanium steel ingot&r&7 can only be produced in the upgraded alloy factory.&r
&l&7Energy transfer:&r
&74 energy level&r = &b2,048 EF&r
&75 energy level&r =&b 8,192 EF&r
&76 energy level&r =&b 32,768 EF&r
&77 energy level&r =&b 131,072 EF&r
&78 energy level&r =&b 524,288 EF&r
&79 energy level&r =&b 2,097,152 EF&r
&710 energy level&r =&b 8,388,608 EF&r
&711 energy level&r =&b 33,554,432 EF&r
The mod has many wires that conduct &bEF energy&r.
At the early stages, it is better to use &6copper&r or &6tin&r wires. Note that copper wires have lower energy loss &7(see wire description).&r
However, be careful: if you supply more energy through the wire than it can carry - &cit will overheat and melt&r.
&7Several sources connected to one line are not dangerous if each of them supplies energy within the permissible energy level - overheating will occur only if the limit is exceeded from one source.&r

&7That is, if (for example, one energy storage) &lacks&r&7to power the entire line of mechanisms, you can connect additional ones - their number is not limited as long as each of them supplies the permissible load.&r
&71 energy level&r = &b32 EF&r
&72 energy level&r = &b128 EF&r
&73 energy level&r = &b512 EF&r
&lEnergy
It's time to &bautomate&r the crafting of components for electrical circuits!
Does not require cooling and heating.
Produce electrical circuits automatically!
Requires &cheating&r.
Use the &7liquid heater&r for heating.
In &aeasy mode&r at this stage you can create a converter to transform energy from &bEF&r &7(energy from Industrial Upgrade)&r to &6FE&r energy &7(for AE2).&r
&cSince AE2 does not accept EF energy directly.&r
In &6standard mode&r, this will only become available after the molecular transformer.
&7Guides for AE2 are not in the quests.&r
Applied Energistics 2
&7This mechanism should be made first&r, as it creates printed circuit boards &62 times more profitably&r than the primitive version.
It may come in handy for &7coal dust with impurities&r.
And also for a simpler crafting of &7silicon crystal&r.
One of the electric analogs of the &7primitive integrator&r.
It can produce &6copper sulfate&r.
Mechanisms that will simplify the production of components for electrical circuits.
Automation of electrical circuits
A mechanism for producing &7lithium, boron, and beryllium.
To obtain &blithium&r, place an iron or &6steel mesh&r &7(at this stage, it is available to you)&r and &6sand&r inside.
&7Its working speed is extremely low, it can only be accelerated with a performance module, which is not available to us yet. So increase the number of mines.
Use the &6stone generator&r - it allows you to create sand and gravel&r.
&7Pour water and lava (in capsules or buckets) into the generator, and then select the desired type of block in the interface.&r
The electric analog of the &7primitive laser polisher.
Polish lithium!
Serves as a &6first generator&r.
Efficiency: &61 coal&r = &b4,000 EF&r
Sensor for crafting advanced mechanisms.
Make plastic in the &7chemical plant.&r
Mix liquid polyethylene and oxygen in the &7solid-fluid integrator&r.
Mix liquid polypropylene and oxygen in the &7solid-fluid integrator&r.
For crafting polyethylene, a &7polymerizer&r is required.
It requires a &edetector SE&r, for which &7thorium&r is needed.
Crafting thorium
is done in this mechanism.
Polyethylene
For crafting polypropylene, a &7polymerizer&r is required.
It requires a &edetector SE&r, for which &7thorium&r is needed.
Crafting thorium
is done in this mechanism.
Polypropylene
Mix acetylene with hydrogen in the &7gas mixer.&r
Ethylene
Obtain acetylene from methane in the &7liquid separator.&r
Or from calcium carbide in the &7liquid integrator.&r
Acetylene
Obtain from natural gas in the &7liquid separator&r.
Methane
Serves as a &6first generator&r.
Efficiency: &61 redstone&r = &b10,000 EF&r
Find a deposit of natural gas.
Natural gas
Mix zinc and dibromopropane in the &7liquid integrator.&r
Propylene
Mix propane and bromine in the &7gas mixer.&r
Dibromopropane
Obtain from natural gas in the &7liquid separator&r.
Propane
Find a deposit of bromine.
Bromine
&lPlastic plate&r - a key resource in further development.
To find &bnatural gas&r and &cbromine&r, you will need a &lgas sensor&r.
Use the sensor by right-clicking - it will display the deposits of various gases.
&3Gas can be collected with capsules.&r
Serves as a &6first generator&r.
Efficiency: &61B of lava&r = &b10,000 EF&r
If you lack cooling and mechanisms are gradually heating up, &7make a more advanced refrigerator.&r
Read the mechanism description.
Make an improved version of the mechanism for processing &6creosote&r.
&aIn easy mode, the crafting is simplified.&r
After crafting the upgraded alloy factory, you can &lstart exploring space&r in the next chapter!&r
Requires &eSolar Energy (SE)&r for operation.
Generates &eSolar Energy (SE)&r for mechanisms that require it.
Also generates &ea piece of solarite&r.
It requires a &edetector SE&r, for which &7thorium&r is needed.
Crafting thorium
is done in this mechanism.
An important multi-block for producing &6creosote&r from steam and coal.
Similar to a blast furnace. Requires &7heating&r and can work faster by increasing pressure.
Supply steam to it from &6electric heater&r or &6primitive&r.
&7You will need a lot of steam, and the electric heater is too slow to maintain operation - it may be more profitable to make many primitive versions of the heater.&r
If you have a farm of any crop, you can process it into &aliquid biomass&r for &benergy&r!
Efficiency: &61B of liquid biomass&r = &b5,000 EF&r
The mechanism requires &aradiation&r to operate!
&7In the future, you will be able to obtain radiation in large quantities from the reactor.&r
The centrifuge is necessary for processing uranium from &agrinded ore&r.
Place it close to or connect with &7radiation pipes&r to the enrichener and put &aradioactive waste&r into it.
&7Receive radiation.&r
Obtain radioactive waste in the &7laser polisher&r by processing &68 enriched fuel&r.
Creosote!
Unlock new crafts and mix gases more profitably!
Mix any oil with creosote in the mixer.
Industrial oil
Separate industrial oil into &7fuel oil&r and &7motor oil.&r
Motor oil
Efficiency: &61B of steam&r = &b2,000 EF&r
Make refrigerant in the &7single liquid adapter.&r
Refrigerant
Distilled water
Pour water and the process will start.
Works faster in hot biomes.
&aIn easy mode, the crafting of the desalinator and its improved versions has been simplified.&r
Mix &7refrigerant and motor oil&r&7.
&lAccelerator on a budget!&r
Pour &6motor oil&r into the canister, placing it in the &6oil refinery&r in the special slot for oil - or simply pour it through a regular tank.&r
To use the oil, &7right-click on the mechanism&r - 125mB will be consumed, and the mechanism will receive &bacceleration for 30 seconds&r.&r
Accelerate mechanisms in exchange for higher energy consumption!
&aIn easy mode, the crafting of the accelerator has been significantly simplified.&r
&lAt this stage, a chapter on advanced technologies will open up for you!&r
Clean unprocessed radioactive elements.
Requires &eSolar Energy (SE)&r.
Process radioactive ores.
Efficiency:
1 peat
Make &6graphene&r in a triple &7solid mixer.&r
For its crafting, you will need &6silicon dioxide&r - &7less costly, it can be produced in a thermal centrifuge from clay dust.
The first &a16 ingots&r should be &7made manually&r - the most difficult way.
For mechanisms that can process uranium, it is much simpler.
For 16 ingots, you will need &a64 uranium ores&r.
Until mechanisms for processing uranium appear, you will have to make it in the &7chemical plant&r.
&7Stone dust can be obtained from cobblestone in a thermal centrifuge.&r
Sulfuric acid
Wear a protective suit for the safe extraction of uranium.
Mix 3 components in the &7triple solid mixer.&r
&a1 unprocessed radioactive uranium&r + &b3 polonium dust&r + 1 nitrate silver dust.
Obtain nitrate silver dust in the &7liquid integrator&r!
&aAt this stage, in easy mode, you can make an air-separating unit and get nitrogen from the air.&r
Then mix nitrogen dioxide with water.
Nitric acid
Efficiency: &61B of hydrogen&r = &b10,000 EF&r
Mix nitrogen monoxide and oxygen in the &7gas mixer.&r
Nitrogen dioxide
Mix hydrogen nitride and oxygen in the &7liquid mixer.&r
Nitrogen monoxide
Mix nitrogen and hydrogen in the &7gas mixer.&r
Hydrogen nitride
Obtain nitrogen from nitrous oxide in the &7liquid mixer by mixing with hydrogen.
Also, the second option in the &7thermoplastic liquid integrator&r from coal dust and nitrous oxide.
Nitrogen
In the &7item separator&r, obtain nitrous oxide.
Nitrous oxide
Process the saltpeter block in the &7mineral separator.&r
&l&7Saltpeter can be found at the bottom of water bodies.
The saltpeter block will be needed for the initial crafting of &7nitrogen&r.
You can excavate the vein with a quarry, install it in the same chunk as the &lpebbles on the surface&r and supply it with energy.
Set the desired height at which it will start digging.
It exclusively digs ores in the chunk it is in.
Consumes &6450 EF/t&r, &brequires cooling&r.
&lAutomatically program the boards!&r
It takes 2 minutes for one operation.
Can be accelerated with the help of &7performance module.&r
ftbquests.chapter.56AEAC22236F88E3.title: &7&lBasic &#1EFFE7&le&#1EEFE9&ll&#1FE0EB&le&#1FD0EE&lc&#1FC1F0&lt&#1FB1F2&lr&#20A2F4&li&#2092F6&lc &#2073FB&le&#2164FD&lr&#2154FF&la
ftbquests.chapter.5A0B30A41D65CC21.quest: &l&7Your main goals in this era will be:&r
&6&lElectrical circuit&r - the basis of all future technologies.
&6&lSteel&r - a key resource for mechanisms.
&b&lEnergy generator&r - a step towards the transition to the electrical era!
&lGoal of the steam era!
Pour water into the integrator and add &6pyrite&r.
Wait for the process to complete.
Sulfur oxide
Place &6oxygen&r from the electrolyzer and &6sulfur oxide&r into the gas chamber.
&31B of oxygen + 2B of sulfur oxide = 2B of sulfur trioxide&r
Sulfur trioxide
Mix &6sulfur trioxide&r and &6steam&r in the gas chamber.
&cSteam in liquid form at this stage can only be obtained from the primitive liquid heater!&r
&31B of sulfur trioxide + 1B of steam = 1B of sulfuric acid&r
Sulfuric acid
Place sulfuric acid and copper in the integrator.
&31B of sulfuric acid = 1B of copper sulfate&r
We are close!
Copper sulfate
For one printed circuit board you need:
&61.25pcs of pyrite&r
&6125mB of oxygen&r
&6250mB of steam&r
This is a hint to calculate how many resources are needed for a certain amount of boards.
To advance the crafting progress, you need to press the left button when the indicator is in the &agreen area&r.
&3Make boards with a reserve, they will come in handy!&r
To advance the crafting progress, you need to press the left button when the indicator is in the &agreen area&r.
Prepare everything for the electrical circuit!
A soldering iron is needed in the slot. To advance the progress, keep the indicator in the &agreen zone&r using &6arrow keys&r on the keyboard.
&3Also, in this mechanism, you can craft capacitors more profitably!&r
&cIt is worth noting that there are&l two levels of electrical circuits!&c!&r
When looking at the craft from the electrical circuit, hover over it - the description will indicate the level required for crafting.
&7Electromotors, which are needed for mechanisms, require a second-level electrical circuit.&r
&cSteam mechanisms require pressure to operate!&r

Open the interface of the &7steam mechanism&r and hover the cursor to the left bottom on the number 0.0 - this is the &6mechanism pressure&r, the tooltip shows how much pressure is required for it to operate.
&7Place a pressure converter next to it, supply superheated steam to it, and set the pressure value.&r
&cRequires lava underneath!&r
Some mechanisms may require more than one pressure.
&lTip:&r Connect mechanisms that require &6the same&r pressure to one pressure converter.
&3Otherwise, the pressure may not appear in the mechanism due to another mechanism.&r
&7There are no pipes in the mod that would transmit pressure.&r
For starters, let's deal with superheated steam, later we will explain why.
For the liquid heater to work, a &csource of lava&r must be spilled underneath. Pour water into it and get &6steam&r, then reheat the steam to &6superheated state&r.
&cSteam from the steam boiler &lwill not work&r&c with the liquid heater!&r
It is better to use two liquid heaters and connect them with pipes, see the scheme on &bthe next page&r.
{image:kubejs:textures/quests/heatsteam.png width:100 height:170 align:1}
Hot steam...
Sulfur crystal is polished in the &6steam polisher&r from sulfur dust.
Sulfur ore can be found in &6crystal veins&r, and is also generated in &6volcanoes&r.
Charges redstone and quartz with current.
Requires &b200A&r (current) for one operation.
&6Oxygen&r from the electrolyzer will be used for your printed circuit boards.
&6Hydrogen&r for coal dust with impurities.
Supply hydrogen to the &7primitive liquid integrator&r and then place coal dust in it.
&3It is more efficient to crush coal dust from &lcoal blocks&r.&r
On average, you will need ≈ 2.67 dusts with impurities for 1 ingot of steel.
Requires &6third-level pressure&r.
Heats up from &clava&r underneath.
&7Heats up to 3,000 degrees, &l&7see in JEI how much heating is required for a specific craft.&r
Place the dust with impurities in the &7mineral separator&r and with a chance of &675%%&r you will get coal dust for alloys.
For &71 steel ingot&r, you will need &72 dusts for alloys&r.
Melt the coal dust for alloys in the &lsmeltery&r, mix it with iron, and &lsmelt&r steel into an ingot.
&7But to obtain pure steel, you need to go through the polishing stage.&r
The polisher will be required for polishing &6sulfur&r, as well as &6steel&r.
&lYour first steel!&r
Polish &7raw steel&r in the polisher.
Crafting steel is a complex and time-consuming task, but ahead lies the &ldomain furnace&r, where everything needed for steel is just &6iron and water&r!
Advanced version of the hammer, durability is &d3 times higher&r.
Mining speed remains the same.
Place &6raw ore&r in the steam crusher or anvil to get &6grinded ore&r.
Then &6smelt&r it in this mechanism.
&cThe mechanism requires lava underneath.&r
For any &7steam mechanism&r to work, &6steam&r is required, which is produced in the steam boiler.
Steam is transmitted to the mechanisms &6directly&r to the steam boiler or &6through steam pipes&r.
&7Also, mechanisms require pressure. &lMore details - in the next quest.&r
Create steam mechanisms &nAs needed&r - in the quests, we will only cover the key ones, necessary for your progress.
&lInformation about steam mechanisms
Store 10B in one block!
Produces steam &btwice as fast&r and requires half the water compared to the steam boiler.
Next, pour &6molten metal&r here and the ingot solidification process will begin.
&3Automate this process with pipes.&r
The speed is incredibly low - there's nothing you can do about it. You can only place more mechanisms.
Mix &62 ingots of molten steel&r and &62 ingots of titanium&r in the smeltery.
Pour the obtained titanium steel into an ingot and polish it in the mechanism.
The casing is required for crafting the electric mechanism.
In the primitive era, I already wrote about the crystal grower.
The grown crystal needs to be placed in a liquid integrator with water.
The obtained silicon crystal should be polished in the &6primitive laser polisher&r.
Next, it will be needed for &6polished silicon discs&r.
&aFor discs, an easy mode crafting was added in the inventory.&r
The electromotor is used in the crafts of many electrical mechanisms.
&7Pay attention: for its creation, a second-level electrical circuit is needed!&r
&6Blast furnace&r - an important step forward!
In the furnace interface, you can increase the pressure &7(steam consumption)&r, thereby &baccelerating the process&r, however, the water consumption will also increase significantly.
Previously, obtaining steel was slow and tedious, but now you will only need water and iron&r!
&cRequires a liquid heater to operate!&r.
&l&7For crafting the blast furnace, you will need:&r
&6Standard:&r 1 stack and 44 magnesium, 27 blocks of brick, &7electrical circuit of level 1&r and more.
&aEasy:&r 54 magnesium, 54 clay, &7electrical circuit of level 1&r and more.
After building the structure, provide the &6blast furnace&r with enough &9water&r using &6steam pumps&r.
Then place a liquid heater next to the &7steam boiler&r.
When the furnace is heated, place iron inside - the &bsteel smelting process&r will begin!
Make a &6liquid heater&r to heat up the &7blast furnace&r or &7steam boiler&r.
Pour &c lava&r into it to start heating.
&7A liquid heater can be used simultaneously for a blast furnace and a steam boiler by placing it between their heating blocks.&r
&aIn easy mode, crafting does not require an electromotor.
&aAlso, in easy mode, at this stage, you can make a &l&aheat pipe&r&a to transmit heat.
Place it &6over a vein&r, load plenty of quarry pipes and 1 drill bit inside.
Supply steam - and it will start working.
The drill digs under itself &63×3 blocks&r down to bedrock.
&3If you only need to extract the vein, it is not necessary for it to continue digging to the very bottom.&r
In the future, it can be &eupgraded&r.
Throw &74 redstone&r, &7polonium dust&r, and &7electrum ingot,&r into the water to get charged quartz.
In the future, you will need a lot of &bcharged redstone&r and &bquartz&r, so we recommend making a &6crystal charger&r as soon as possible - it is a bit further along the quest line.
Identical to the regular steam quarry, but digs &6an area of 7×7&r!
Requires a &cdrill nano-bit&r.
&aCrafting at this stage is only available in easy mode!&r
You can find a block of peat in water bodies - dig it up.
Make a block of peat and &7smelt&r it!
Make a &6generator on peat&r from peat and titanium steel.
Pour &9water&r into it and place a &6processed peat ingot&r - this is its fuel.
&nEffective, but requires a lot of peat.&r
If you don't want to depend on constant peat extraction, it's better to make more &6steam converters&r or a &cmulti-block steam boiler&r for passive steam production.
Before you enter the electrical era, you can switch to a more environmentally friendly path - &abiomechanisms&r.
Do not require pressure - easier to use.
Do not require &c lava&r underneath and also do not have access to upgrades (for example, accelerator).
The first step is to create a &6steam bio-generator&r.
It produces &aliquid biomass&r from &6biomass&r or &6waste&r.
&lHow to start the generator:&r
Supply &6steam&r to the generator, and it also requires &61 pressure&r.
&3Tip: Biomechanisms are a great intermediate step if you want to reduce pollution before electricity becomes available.&r
&lInformation about biomechanisms:&r
All biomechanisms require &aliquid biomass&r, similar to steam.
Do not pollute the air or soil.
Read all the information
&b&lUpgrade&r the steam boiler!
&l2.&r In the &7heat exchanger&r, place &6ferrite ring conductor&r and &610 coils&r. &7The heat exchanger&r is located in the center of the lower level.
&l3.&r Install a &7liquid heater&r next to the &7steam boiler&r and pour lava into it, as usual.
&l4.&r In the &7right tank&r, pour &9water&r - using pipes or capsules. With heating, &bthe process of steam production will begin&r.
&3Steam will be supplied to the left tank - connect a steam pipe to it for further use.&r
Produces 2 mB of steam from 1 mB of water.
Speed is 2 times higher than that of the &6steam converter&r.
&3The controller has no interface.&r
&l&7For crafting the steam boiler, you will need:&r
&6Standard:&r 36 steel and aluminum bronze, 2 stacks and 34 iridium, &7electrical circuit of level 1&r and more.
&aEasy:&r 18 steel and aluminum bronze, 1 stack and 17 iridium, &7electrical circuit of level 1&r and more.
&7&lHow to start producing steam:&r
&l1.&r Assemble the structure.
This &abiomechanism&r can be crafted earlier than its electric version - it has no steam analog.
This &abiomechanism&r can be crafted earlier than its electric version - it has no steam analog.
Pour &9water&r into it.
This &abiomechanism&r can be crafted earlier than its electric version - it has no steam analog.
Requires &cheating&r: place a &7liquid heater&r nearby or connect a &7heat pipe&r.
&aIn easy mode, at this stage, you can create a tank for 40B!&r
Transfers current.
Let's do some chemistry!
&l&7Pump water automatically!
Works within a radius of 3x3x3 blocks. The pump also consumes steam to operate.
{image:kubejs:textures/quests/pump.png width:120 height:100 align:1}
Crush raw ore on the anvil with the hammer to receive &7additional products.&r
&lProduce rubber at a 1 to 3 ratio!&r
Converts steam into &b&lelectricity.
Requires &c lava&r underneath.
Does not require lava - needs steam, electricity, and water.
To supply electricity to the electrolyzer, place a &6current transformer&r next to it.
A much more convenient version of the &oprimitive liquid heater&r.
&7Also requires lava underneath.
Accepts steam &6from the steam boiler&r and can be easily automated with liquid pipes, &7make it as early as possible.&r
An important mechanism for crafting electrical circuits.
ftbquests.chapter.5A0B30A41D65CC21.title: &6&lSteam era
ftbquests.chapter.f34f4flf45056lf4515elf: By completing quests, you will receive &l&6quest coins&r.
ftbquests.chapter.56AEAC22236F88E3.quest: Many machines have a slot for a &lReceptor&r — it's a filter that determines what the machine will craft.
By default, the receptor has a &7blacklist&r enabled.
To configure it, use the &6Receptor Configurator&r: insert a receptor and specify an item that the machine should either ignore — or craft.
